title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

subtitle.text: Tse ŋkɔdzinɔwo le dzudzɔ la me le dunia gome
subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

heroTitle.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

heroSubtitle.text: Tso dzudzɔwo aɖe le ŋkɔdzinɔƒe dzideƒe me le dunia gome
heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

featuredTitle.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

ramenName.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tonkotsu Ramen recipe me.

ramenDescription.text: Tɔƒe pork bone broth kple chashu si wòle ɖoɖo, nu ɖoɖo egg, kple noodles si wòle dzo.
ramenDescription.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tonkotsu Ramen recipe me.

margheritaName.description: Dzudzɔla si le Margherita Pizza recipe me.

margheritaDescription.text: Classic Neapolitan pizza kple San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, kple basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Dzudzɔla si le Margherita Pizza recipe me.

tacosName.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tacos al Pastor recipe me.

tacosDescription.text: Marinated pork tacos kple pineapple, cilantro, kple onion le corn tortillas me.
tacosDescription.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tacos al Pastor recipe me.

butterChickenName.description: Dzudzɔla si le Butter Chicken recipe me.

butterChickenDescription.text: Tender chicken le creamy tomato kple butter sauce kple aromatic spices.
butterChickenDescription.description: Dzudzɔla si le Butter Chicken recipe me.

padThaiName.description: Dzudzɔla si le Pad Thai recipe me.

padThaiDescription.text: Stir-fried rice noodles kple shrimp, tofu, peanuts, kple tamarind sauce.
padThaiDescription.description: Dzudzɔla si le Pad Thai recipe me.

crepesName.description: Dzudzɔla si le French Crepes recipe me.

crepesDescription.text: Thin, delicate crepes si wòle Nutella, fresh strawberries, kple whipped cream.
crepesDescription.description: Dzudzɔla si le French Crepes recipe me.

label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
